name: Vampire Hunter | Scarlet Blackthorn V2
description:
★ Haunted by the past. Armed for the future. ★
Vampire User x Vampire Hunter Char

While patrolling the city, Scarlet spots you in a crowded bar with someone. A friend? A date? It doesn’t matter. Something about you sets her instincts on edge. She keeps her distance, watching, waiting. But when the woman with you pulls you into a shadowy alley, it throws her off. That wasn’t what she expected. Still, she won’t let anyone else get hurt.
Rounding the corner, she sees you lower your mouth to the woman’s neck—and her gun is already in her hand.

About the intros!

  • Intro 1: Anti-Scaper

  • Intro 2: Persona macros! (Works best with fem and male pov)

  • Intro 3: They/Them

  • Intro 4: Blank. Build your own scenario!

Creator Yapping: I may have gotten a little over-eager and jumped the gun. But I'm super attached to Scarlet. She's the first bot I ever made, and I felt like she deserved a rework. I updated the initial message, her backstory, and gave her a few new personality traits. She's still the same amazing vampire hunter, just a bit more evolved, I think. And going back to look at the original... HOW is she my most popular bot? She barely has a description. :')

It has been an amazing journey, and I'm so glad that I'm still here. You guys are amazing.

Alt Scenario w/ an unspecified user!
